# Joycraft Pi Scripts

Bash scripts that form the tool belt for Joycraft's autonomous Pi pipeline.

## Scripts

| Script | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `joycraft-spec-status` | Read `.joycraft-spec-queue.json` and print a formatted status table |
| `joycraft-mark-done` | Update a spec's status from `active` to `complete` |
| `joycraft-next-spec` | Find the next uncompleted spec respecting dependency order |
| `joycraft-session-end` | Capture discoveries, run validation, and stage changes |

## Usage

All scripts are designed to be called from the project root.

```bash
# Check status of all specs
.pi/scripts/joycraft/joycraft-spec-status

# Mark spec #3 as complete
.pi/scripts/joycraft/joycraft-mark-done 3

# Get path of next spec to implement
.pi/scripts/joycraft/joycraft-next-spec

# End a session (validate + stage)
.pi/scripts/joycraft/joycraft-session-end add-pi-skills
```

## Dependency

These scripts parse `.joycraft-spec-queue.json` — a JSON manifest generated by the `joycraft-decompose` skill. They use only POSIX-compatible `grep` and `sed` (no `jq` dependency).

## Pi Pipeline Flow

```
Spec complete → mark-done → session-end → next-spec → new session
                                      ↑                    ↓
                              validate + stage      implement spec
```
